training_data.description: User can paste text or upload a resume file for AI analysis

example_prompts.user_input: I want to improve my resume for a software engineering job.
example_prompts.expected_output: Suggest improvements for work experience, skills, and ATS keywords matching for software engineering roles.

example_prompts.user_input: Can you analyze my uploaded PDF resume?
example_prompts.expected_output: Parse the uploaded PDF, extract key sections (contact info, experience, education, skills) and give improvement suggestions.

example_prompts.user_input: How many characters are in my pasted resume?
example_prompts.expected_output: Count the total characters in the pasted resume text.

training_data.description: Displays AI analysis including overall score, ATS compatibility, keywords matched, format quality, and impact score

example_prompts.user_input: Show me my resume score and suggestions.
example_prompts.expected_output: Display overall score, ATS compatibility percentage, matched keywords count, format quality, impact score, and improvement suggestions.

example_prompts.user_input: Highlight strengths in my resume.
example_prompts.expected_output: List key strengths like technical skills, work achievements, certifications, and relevant experience.

example_prompts.user_input: What keywords should I include to improve ATS score?
example_prompts.expected_output: Suggest industry-specific and role-specific keywords that are missing from the resume.

training_data.description: Gives specific actionable suggestions to improve the resume

example_prompts.user_input: What can I improve in my resume for a senior developer role?
example_prompts.expected_output: Advise on expanding technical skills, adding quantified achievements, improving formatting, and including relevant keywords for senior developer roles.

example_prompts.user_input: Correct grammar and formatting in my resume.
example_prompts.expected_output: Provide a corrected version of the resume text with proper grammar, punctuation, formatting, and consistent styling.

training_data.description: Provides sample resumes for different job roles

example_prompts.user_input: Show me a sample software engineer resume.
example_prompts.expected_output: Display a complete example resume suitable for a software engineer including contact info, experience, skills, and education.

example_prompts.user_input: I want to see a marketing manager sample resume.
example_prompts.expected_output: Display a sample resume for marketing manager roles with proper format, skills, and experience sections.

training_data.description: User can add a new job application with details like company, position, date, status, description, and notes

example_prompts.user_input: Add a new job application for Google as a Software Engineer.
example_prompts.expected_output: Create a new job entry: company='Google', position='Software Engineer', status='Applied', and optional fields like applicationDate, jobDescription, and notes if provided.

example_prompts.user_input: I applied for a Marketing Manager position at HubSpot.
example_prompts.expected_output: Create a job entry for company='HubSpot', position='Marketing Manager', status='Applied', with optional description and notes.

training_data.description: Displays user's saved job applications and allows filtering and sorting

example_prompts.user_input: Show me all my job applications.
example_prompts.expected_output: List all jobs with company, position, application date, and status.

example_prompts.user_input: Filter jobs that are in Interviewing status.
example_prompts.expected_output: Display only jobs where status='Interviewing'.

example_prompts.user_input: Sort my jobs by oldest first.
example_prompts.expected_output: Sort all job entries by applicationDate ascending.

example_prompts.user_input: Show me jobs at Google only.
example_prompts.expected_output: Filter jobs where company='Google'.

training_data.description: Displays summary statistics like total applications, interviewing, offers, rejected, and success rate

example_prompts.user_input: How many applications have I submitted?
example_prompts.expected_output: Return the total number of job applications submitted.

example_prompts.user_input: How many interviews do I have scheduled?
example_prompts.expected_output: Return the number of job applications with status='Interviewing'.

example_prompts.user_input: What is my success rate?
example_prompts.expected_output: Calculate the percentage of jobs with status='Offered' out of total applications.

training_data.description: Allows user to export their job application data as CSV

example_prompts.user_input: Export all my job applications as CSV.
example_prompts.expected_output: Generate a CSV file with headers (Company, Position, Status, Application Date, Description, Notes) and include all job entries.
